creator: rsidd@physics.iisc.ernet.in
text:
The ports/graphics/pstoedit Makefile contains dependencies for
  libplot.3 and libplotter.3 but the libplot port has been upgraded
  to version 4.

Fix: 

In the Makefile for pstoedit, for LIB_DEPENDS, change plot.3 
  and plotter.3 to plot.4 and plotter.4 respectively.
How-To-Repeat: 
  cd /usr/ports/graphics/pstoedit; make
